untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection for 'Double Bottom' requires multi-bar price structure analysis (identifying two distinct bottoms at same level, resistance between them, prior downtrend, and no lower lows between bottoms). This requires pattern recognition logic beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons. The 50% throwback behavior and exact price level matching cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators and the allowed operators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex reversal pattern requiring: (1) identification of two swing lows at similar prices, (2) detection of prior downtrend, (3) resistance level extraction between bottoms, (4) breakout confirmation above resistance, and (5) optional throwback validation. These multi-bar structural requirements exceed the scope of single-bar technical indicators. A proper implementation would require a dedicated pattern detection module with lookback window analysis and swing point identification.
